summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Phase 2 POS system additions. All backend APIs functional (31/31 tests pass). Frontend fully operational with 8 navigation items, inventory management, suppliers, reports, customers & loyalty features working correctly.
passed_tests: All 8 navigation items functional (Mesas, Cocina, Caja, Invent., Compras, Reporte, Clientes, Config)
Inventory: Stock tab shows 4 tracked products with warehouse info
Inventory: Warehouses tab shows Almacén Principal and Barra
Inventory: Recipes tab accessible (no recipes initially)
Inventory: Alerts tab shows 'Todo el inventario está en niveles normales'
Suppliers: Shows 3 suppliers with RNC badges (Distribuidora Nacional, Mariscos del Caribe, Bebidas Nacionales SRL)
Suppliers: Purchase Orders tab functional (empty initially)
Reports: Daily summary cards show correct data (RD$ 460.80 total sales, 1 bill, RD$ 64.80 ITBIS, RD$ 36.00 tips)
Reports: Email daily close section visible with preview mode
Reports: Charts working (by category, top products, by waiter)
Customers: Shows 3 sample customers (Carlos Rodriguez 220pts, Juan Perez 150pts, Maria Garcia 80pts)
Customers: Loyalty config shows 10 pts/RD$100, RD$1 per point, 50 pts min redemption
Customers: Canjear buttons working for eligible customers
Backend APIs: All 31 tests passed including Phase 2 endpoints
Core POS flow functional: Login → Tables → Order → Kitchen → Billing
